global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with promotional text and food illustrations.
global.main_message: Promoting fast food options with a discount offer.

elements.label: Solid yellow background
elements.description: A bright yellow background that fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Two food items
elements.description: A simple illustration of two food items, represented as stylized outlines, placed centrally within the ad.

elements.label: Additional food item
elements.description: Another stylized outline of a food item, positioned slightly to the right of the first, maintaining a minimalist design.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold, black text that reads 'Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' is presented in a bold font at the top left corner, colored in a contrasting shade to stand out.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button at the bottom center of the ad with the text 'Learn more' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: A small, bold text displaying '-30%' in a bright color, located at the bottom left corner, indicating a promotional discount.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and minimalist, fast food, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top left, the headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Fast food, fast Fresh favorites nearby, CraveLoop, Learn more, 30%
